description: Merge conflict failed at tier ai-resolve. Branch: overstory/builder-phase67u/SDLC-KIT-8794. Agent: builder-phase67u. Conflicting files: .

content: Plugin structure follows official Claude Code plugin spec: .claude-plugin/plugin.json at plugin root, commands/ and agents/ at plugin root level (not inside .claude-plugin/). plugin.json contains only standard fields: name, description, version, author, homepage, repository, license, keywords. Commands are namespaced as /sdlc-launcher:<command> when loaded via --plugin-dir.

title: MA-2 core architecture decisions
rationale: PWA offline requirement makes local-first mandatory; Clerk satisfies httpOnly cookie NFR without hand-rolling auth; shadcn/ui meets Lighthouse ≥90 with copy-paste component model (no monolithic bundle)

content: MA-2 system design: Next.js 14 App Router + TanStack Query + Dexie.js repository pattern. Components split into ui/ (shadcn) and finance/ (domain). All Dexie queries enforce userId filter. Recurrence calculates next due date from originalDueDate (not completedAt) to prevent drift. Undo-before-persist (5s delay) for task completion.
